title: Antidote
description:
Adds medicine from Minecraft: Education 
Edition
body:
Adds medicine which is used to cure some negative effects from Minecraft: Education Edition **!Note: All textures are 1 to 1 remakes from Minecraft: Education Edition**
Content - Antidote: Obtained from Master Level Cleric Villagers or Wandering Traders. Antidote cures Posion. - Eye Drops: Obtained from Expert Level Cleric Villagers. Eye Drops cure Blindness - Elixir: Obtained from Expert Level Cleric Villagers. Elixir cures Weakness - Tonic: Obtained from Master Level Cleric Villagers or Wandering Traders. Tonic cures Nausea
